title: Thai Mars Bar Dessert
description: A decadent Thai-inspired dessert made with Mars bars and indulgent ingredients. Perfect for a sweet treat.
instructions: Crush the Mars bars into small pieces.
In a medium saucepan, combine the heavy cream, coconut milk, Thai red curry paste, and granulated sugar.
Whisk the mixture over medium heat until the sugar dissolves and the mixture simmers.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the vanilla extract and crushed Mars bars.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
Chill the mixture in the refrigerator until it's cold and set.
Scoop the chilled mixture into individual serving cups or ramekins.
Serve the dessert chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of salt if desired.
